description_long: This figure depicts an adult pedestrian dressed in a long, rugged trench coat with reinforced shoulder pads and a wide-brimmed hat, evoking a steampunk or post-apocalyptic aesthetic. The coat features metallic and leather-like elements, with visible mechanical components on the shoulders and back, including circular devices and tubing. The character's hands are gloved, and the lower legs are protected by armored greaves, while the feet are clad in modern sneakers. A utility belt with pouches and a prominent circular device on the chest further accentuate the utilitarian design. The face is obscured by the hat and a high collar, giving the figure a mysterious and prepared appearance suitable for urban exploration or hazardous environments.
description: A mysterious adult pedestrian in a long, armored trench coat with mechanical shoulder pads, a wide-brimmed hat, and modern sneakers, blending steampunk and urban explorer styles.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full trench coat, mechanical chest device, wide-brimmed hat, and gloved hands.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the layered shoulder armor, utility belt, and the profile of the hat.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the circular mechanical device on the back, detailed shoulder pads, and pouches on the belt.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the arm armor, coat layers, and side profile of the hat.
attribute_clothing_type: long armored trench coat with reinforced shoulder pads, wide-brimmed hat, gloves, and utility belt with mechanical accessories
attribute_hairstyle: hair fully covered by hat and collar
